content: Planned action: verify whether Romy's installation is actually complete in Topbrutus/MonCerveauGPT by inspecting brain/robots/romy/, the hamster count, the presence and contents of core personal files, and the relevant third-eye traces, then report clearly what is complete vs what is missing.

Planned action: diagnose why the top matrix still flashes between site icons and live thumbnails after the recent hotfix on fix/utf8-icons-2026-03-25, then prepare a targeted correction so only the stable site icon/favicon is shown with no flicker.

Planned action: inspect the current page_matrix/icon data on fix/utf8-icons-2026-03-25, then push a targeted fix that stops using live thumbnails in the top matrix and keeps only the stable site icon/favicon.

Planned action: inspect the current ninoscreens codebase on fix/utf8-icons-2026-03-25 to determine whether a prior split-view feature still exists partially, which files would own it, and what the smallest safe implementation path is before any new modification.

Planned action: prepare the technical implementation plan for a V1 focus-only split mode in ninoscreens on fix/utf8-icons-2026-03-25, keeping the 12-tile grid untouched. The plan is to add a Split button on the right of the toolbar for a focused tile, toggle a second independent web view on the right side of the focus area, and reclick to desplit and remove the right panel cleanly.
